name: Diamond Genesis Drop #10 — Governance Voice
description:
Advisory governance — non-binding holder votes on perk additions, treasury reallocation proposals, partner candidates, and content roadmap. One vote per Genesis Drop held.

Unlockable perk: 1 advisory vote per quarter on roadmap proposals.

Membership access only. No revenue claims, no profit sharing. Educational and community-utility content. See docs/UTILITY-PERKS.md.
